label: Algo Configuration
description: Algorithm selector and conditional parameter fields: TWAP/VWAP, iceberg, and benchmark configuration.

0.6.note: Pure config form, no async data; non-execute mode guard returns informational message.

0.7.note: No data arrays; all config is static constants.

0.8.note: No async data path; error handling delegated to book-preview-compliance-widget.

0.9.note: Comments on lines 34-35 and 114 are explanatory; no dead code.

l0.notes: 6 checks pass, 3 N/A (pure synchronous config form).

1.1.note: All data via useBookTradeData() — no inline fetch or direct imports.

1.2.note: Context reads useGlobalScope(). Widget reads executionMode/algo/algoParams/defiAlgo from shared scoped context.

1.3.note: Pure config panel — no filterable data set.

1.6.note: Pure config panel — no filterable data set.

1.7.note: BOOK_ALGO_OPTIONS from lib/config/services/trading.config, DEFI_ALGO_TYPES from lib/config/services/defi.config.

l1.notes: Reference data in correct config locations.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab and f9f29ea.

3.1.note: Only shown in execute mode. In batch mode widget should be hidden/disabled (user not submitting live orders).

3.2.note: executionMode from context controls widget visibility (shows informational message when not execute).

3.3.note: Human must verify widget hides or shows read-only state in batch mode.

3.5.note: Paper mode: algo config should work identically. No blocking issue.

l3.notes: Agent checks complete. 3.3 needs human verification.

4.1.note: All onChange handlers wired (setAlgo, setAlgoParam). No empty onClick.

4.3.note: Human must verify TWAP/VWAP/ICEBERG/BENCHMARK conditional param sections show correctly.

4.4.note: Human must verify DeFi vs CeFi branch renders correct params for selected algo.

4.7.note: Human must verify CollapsibleSection toggle works.

4.8.note: Human must verify scroll at minW=3, minH=3.

5.1.note: CeFi branch: MARKET, LIMIT, TWAP, VWAP, ICEBERG, BENCHMARK_FILL algos. DeFi branch: SOR_DEX, SOR_TWAP, BENCHMARK_FILL algos per instruction type (SWAP, PROVIDE_LIQUIDITY, STAKE, BRIDGE).

l5.notes: Algorithm strategy matrix documented. Human walkthrough 5.2-5.6 deferred.

7.2.note: No lib/mocks imports. Reference data from lib/config/.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: No useEffect/useMemo/useCallback in widget file — computation in context.

8.1.note: Fixed: text-[10px] → text-caption on all form labels. text-[11px] → text-caption on mode-guard message. text-[9px] → text-nano on DeFi available-count Badge.

8.3.note: Uses FormWidget, CollapsibleSection, Card, CardContent, Input, Select, Badge from shared/ui primitives.

8.4.note: Agent: no img without alt. All form fields have adjacent label. No interactive divs. Human: keyboard + screen-reader pass needed.

8.5.note: Human must verify at minW=3, minH=3.

l8.notes: All L8.1 violations fixed (text-[9px] Badge → text-nano).

keepSeparate.rationale: Algo config is conditionally rendered (only in execute mode) and contains multiple conditional sub-sections. Keeping it separate lets users collapse or remove it from the layout when not needed.

relationships.notes: Reads executionMode and category from shared context driven by book-order-form. Renders different param sets based on those selections.

dataContract.notes: Pure configuration widget — no data fetching. All state is form state from shared book-data-context. Config constants from lib/config/services/trading.config and lib/config/services/defi.config.

gaps: LIMIT order type has no duration/price params shown (these are on the order form price field)
DeFi SOR_TWAP slices param not shown (only duration field shown)
coverage.notes: CeFi branch covers all BOOK_ALGO_OPTIONS. DeFi branch covers INSTRUCTION_ALGO_MAP entries.

knownIssues.note: book-data-context.tsx handleSubmit uses defiAlgo for DeFi lane but the CeFi algo_type is passed as null for non-DeFi orders (line ~345). The CeFi algo from algoParams is not forwarded to placeMockOrder. Pre-existing bug in context — not in widget file.

findings.description: book-algo-config-widget.tsx — text-[10px] on all form labels, text-[11px] on mode-guard message, text-[9px] on available-count Badge
findings.fix: text-[10px] and text-[11px] replaced with text-caption throughout. text-[9px] on DeFi available-count Badge replaced with text-nano.

findings.description: book-algo-config-widget.tsx:52 — text-[9px] on DeFi available-count Badge
findings.fix: Replaced text-[9px] with text-nano utility (maps to --text-nano: 0.5625rem / 9px from @theme).

findings.description: book-algo-config-widget.tsx — ~15 user-visible strings. No i18n applied.
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21
